presets.name: Slide Up
presets.code:
// [FEE-LOGIC] — {id} — initial
gsap.from('[data-af-id="{id}"]', { y: 40, opacity: 0, duration: 0.7, ease: 'power3.out' });

presets.name: Slide Left
presets.code:
// [FEE-LOGIC] — {id} — initial
gsap.from('[data-af-id="{id}"]', { x: -60, opacity: 0, duration: 0.6, ease: 'power2.out' });

presets.name: Scale In
presets.code:
// [FEE-LOGIC] — {id} — initial
gsap.from('[data-af-id="{id}"]', { scale: 0.8, opacity: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'back.out(1.7)' });

presets.name: Slide Down
presets.code:
// [FEE-LOGIC] — {id} — exit
gsap.to('[data-af-id="{id}"]', { y: 30, opacity: 0, duration: 0.5, ease: 'power2.in' });

presets.name: Breathe
presets.code:
// [FEE-LOGIC] — {id} — idle
gsap.to('[data-af-id="{id}"]', { scale: 1.04, duration: 1.8, ease: 'sine.inOut', yoyo: true, repeat: -1 });

presets.name: Pulse Border
Parallax Y
Reveal Scroll
Noise Shake
presets.code:
// [FEE-LOGIC] — {id} — distorsion
gsap.to('[data-af-id="{id}"]', { x: 'random(-4, 4)', y: 'random(-4, 4)', duration: 0.08, ease: 'none', repeat: 20, yoyo: true });

presets.name: Stagger
presets.code:
// [FEE-LOGIC] — {id} — stagger
gsap.from('[data-af-id="{id}"] > *', { opacity: 0, y: 20, duration: 0.5, stagger: 0.1, ease: 'power2.out' });
